results.name: free-cast-another
results.description: Cast other things without paying their mana cost.

results.name: free discard outlet
results.description: Ways to discard repeatedly that require no additional cost or numerical limit.

results.name: free sacrifice outlet
results.description: Ways to sacrifice a permanent repeatedly that require no additional cost.

results.name: freeze
results.description: A permanent doesn't untap during its next N untap steps. For effects that prevent untapping indefinitely, see [lockdown](lockdown).

results.name: freeze-creature
results.description: Prevent a creature from untapping for its next N untaps. For effects that prevent untapping indefinitely, see [lockdown](lockdown-creature).

results.name: freeze-permanent-any
results.description: Freeze/stun effects that work against permanents of all types.

results.name: french vanilla
results.description: These creatures, vehicles and spacecraft have only keyword abilities.

results.name: french vanilla aura
results.description: Auras that give stat changes and/or keywords with no other effects.

results.name: french vanilla equipment
results.description: Equipment that give a creature a stat change and/or a keyword with no other effects.

results.name: french vanilla walker
results.description: French vanilla creatures with only a landwalk ability.

results.name: freyja nordottir
results.description: Josephine Chang's Final Fantasy XIV character.

results.name: fried egg
results.description: Do you prefer sunny-side-up or over-easy?

results.name: frog, fleeing
results.description: Frogs tend to flee from things in art

results.name: frost armor
results.description: Spells cost additional mana to target stuff you control.

results.name: fulfilled futureshift
results.description: This card was initially futureshifted, and has now received its proper print in its future expansion.

results.name: full refund
results.description: Cards that give you mana equal to or greater than the amount of mana spent for it, either in the form of a immediately usable mana ability, a ritual effect, or untapped lands

results.name: fu manchu
results.description: A mustache used as a stereotype for East Asians, two long "tendrils" surrounding the mouth and growing past the chin. Sometimes accompanied by a goatee.

results.name: functional art
results.description: Un-Set cards in which their art doubles as a function of the card, usually as a way to track things.

results.name: functional reminder counter
results.description: Arbitrarily long effects tracked with a counter, such that removing the counter functionally changes the tracked effect. See also [nonfunctional reminder counter](/tags/card/nonfunctional-reminder-counter).

results.name: funeral pyre
results.description: A solemn ritual of burning a body.

results.name: fungal clothing
results.description: Clothing made/adorned with fungus, lichen, etc, mainly found among the Golgari-aligned denizens of Ravnica.

results.name: fun guy
results.description: Thallids, mycoids, and other mushroomfolk.

results.name: fun reminder text
results.description: Reminder text that have a bit more flavor than just explaining things.

results.name: fun ruling
results.description: Cards with rulings where the rules manager is having fun with us. Not necessarily laugh-out-loud funny.

results.name: furnace host
results.description: The red Phyrexian Invasion forces

results.name: furnace layer
results.description: The red aligned sphere of New Phyrexia, built during/after the Mirran/Phyrexian war. Also known as The Autonomous Furnace.

results.name: future sight engine
results.description: Cards that reveal the top card of your library and conditionally play it. See also [precognition engine](/tags/card/precognition-engine) for a more recent variant in this vein.

results.name: fyndhorn
results.description: A region in southeastern [Terisiare](terisiare) that emerged during the Ice Age due to the lowering of the sea level. It was submerged once again after the World Spell initiated the Thaw.

results.name: gag
results.description: Something covering the mouth, preventing speech.

results.name: gainland
results.description: Lands that have you gain life when they enter the battlefield.
